steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage states that the Southern Pacific already controlled 85% of California’s railways, then says it “further solidified its ______ in rail access.” The key signal is that the blank must describe something that can be increased after already having strong control.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content: A) dominance means having controlling power or influence, which matches the idea of strengthening an already strong position. The other three either contradict the idea of increasing control (creativity, insignificance, neutrality) or describe unrelated qualities. That matches choice A — A is correct.
